zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac於大約1230年出生在法國崔英德-吉洛易沙特-莫-德-圖萊時，他的父親Josbert de Pressigny42歲，母親Agnès de Vendôme20歲。他於大約1255年與Jeanne de RANCON在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1271年在他的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac于大约1230年出生在法国崔英德-吉洛易沙特-莫-德-圖萊时，他的父亲Josbert de Pressigny42岁，母亲Agnès de Vendôme20岁。他于大约1255年与Jeanne de RANCON在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1271年在他的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sainte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sain   1, a surname of German origin.
French: probably a variant of Saïn (see Sain 6).
West African (Gambia): variant of the Serer name Sène (see Sene 2).

variants.name: Sain
meanings: Americanized form of German Zirn, which is a variant of Zürn (see Zurn ). Compare Saine , Sane , and Sayne .

Croatian and Serbian (Šain): metonymic occupational name for a hawker or a nickname from ša(h)in ‘falcon, hawk (trained for hunting)’, a word of Turkish and ultimately Persian origin (see Sahin ). Compare Shain and Shine .

Americanized form of Slovenian and Croatian Šajn: nickname from šajn, an obsolete loanword from German meaning ‘shine’, or a Slavicized form of German Schein . As a Croatian surname it may also be a variant of Šain (see 2 above). Compare Shain and Shine .

variants.name: Sene
meanings: French (Sené and Séné): nickname from Old French sené ‘wise, sensible’.

West African (Senegal; Sène): name found among the Serer people, of unexplained etymology. The same name forms part of the name of Roog Seen, the supreme deity in the indigenous Serer religion. Compare Saine 3.

nameMeanings.name: Maure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Ernesto, Ramon, Adela, Carlos, Eladio, Emilia, Estrella, Horacio, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Mario.  Italian Alessandra, Angelo, Cecilio, Cosimo, Gianfranco, Lorenzo, Mauro.
Catalan: from the personal name Mauri, Latin Maurus (see Mauro ).
Catalan and French (Occitan): probably from the personal name Malric (ancient Germanic Almaricus).

variants.name: Mauro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Domenic, Giuseppe, Antonio, Carmine, Carmelo, Domenico, Gaetano, Nino, Pasquale.

Italian (mainly southern): from the personal name Mauro, derived from the Latin personal and ethnic name Maurus, borne by various early Christian saints and meaning ‘Moor, North African’. Compare Moore and Moro .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac was born about 1230, in Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, his father, Josbert de Pressigny, was 42 and his mother, Agnès de Vendôme, was 20. He married Jeanne de RANCON about 1255, in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1271, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac est né environ 1230, à Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, son père, Josbert de Pressigny, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Vendôme, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de RANCON environ 1255, à Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1271, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac um 1230 in Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Josbert de Pressigny 42 und seine Mutter Agnès de Vendôme 20. Er hat um 1255 in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Jeanne de RANCON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1271 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac è nato il circa 1230 nel Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Josbert de Pressigny, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Vendôme, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de RANCON circa 1255, nel Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1271, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillacが約1230年にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアーサインテ-マアウレ-デ-トウレアインで生まれた時，父Josbert de Pressignyは42歳，母Agnès de Vendômeは20歳であった。約1255年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンランコンでJeanne de RANCONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1271年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac(이)가 대략 1230년 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 세인테-모레-데-토우레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Josbert de Pressigny(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Vendôme(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1255년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 랭콘에서 Jeanne de RANCON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1271년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1230–ABT 1271: tany ho any amin'ny 1230–tany ho any amin'ny 1271

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, seu pai, Josbert de Pressigny, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Vendôme, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de RANCON aproximadamente 1255, em Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1271, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac родился около 1230 г. в местности сеинте-мауре-де-тоуреаин, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Josbert de Pressigny было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Vendôme, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de RANCON около 1255 г. в местности ранкон, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1271 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

sm.ABT 1230–ABT 1271: e tusa o le 1230–e tusa o le 1271

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume III de Sainte Maure de Marsillac nació aproximadamente 1230, en Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, su papá, Josbert de Pressigny, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Agnès de Vendôme, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jeanne de RANCON aproximadamente 1255, en Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1271, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
